steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" popup within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Other Teams Capabilities" dropdown option in the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" selector within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Select the "Simple Bot" option from the "Teams Capability" dropdown menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Python" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown within Visual Studio Code, selecting it from the language list.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown located in the Workspace Folder selection box to specify the project root directory.
Click the "infra" folder in the EXPLORER panel of Visual Studio Code to expand its contents.
Click the "config.py" file under the "src" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code.

Click the "config.py" tab in the Visual Studio Code editor to activate the file for editing. The click is targeted at the file tab in the main interface, where the file name is visually highlighted to indicate selection.
